title: Social Profile
description: Platform social profile (LinkedIn company, Twitter/X, etc.)

platform.description: The social platform this profile belongs to. Commonly found in: linkedin.com/company, twitter.com, x.com.

profile_type.description: Whether this profile belongs to a person, company, or organization.

username_or_handle.description: The username or @handle for this profile.

display_name.description: The public display name of the profile.

bio.description: Short biography or description text on the profile.

following_count.description: Number of accounts the profile is following.

post_count.description: Total number of posts or tweets published.

verified.description: Whether the profile has a verified badge.

website_url.description: External website URL listed on the profile.

founded_year.description: Year the company was founded. Applicable to company profiles.

employee_count_range.description: Employee count range for company profiles (e.g., '11-50').

profile_url.description: Canonical URL of the profile page.

avatar_url.description: URL to the profile avatar / profile picture.

banner_url.description: URL to the profile banner / header image.

pinned_post_url.description: URL of the pinned post on the profile.

snapshot_at.description: Timestamp when the profile data was snapshotted.

source_url.description: The URL of the page this data was sourced from.

extracted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this record was extracted.
